name: Bloodflame Sword
descs:
First Turn Start of an Encounter: Identities with Base Attack Skills that gain [Combustion] gain 5 [Combustion] and heal 8 SP

For Heishou Pack - You Branch Identities: HP gets capped to 49% of Max HP. In return, take 50% less damage and receive 50% reduced heal (except healing from E.G.O Gifts)
